philippines.title: Silent Sanctuary highlights OFWs in 'Una' music video featuring Xyriel Manabat
philippines.description:
Silent Sanctuary paid tribute to overseas Filipino workers (OFWs) through its “Una” music video featuring Xyriel Manabat, showing the sacrifices and painful realities the modern-day heroes endure to provide for their families. The video, released on Universal Records Philippines’ YouTube channel last Saturday, May 23, stars Manabat as an OFW who hides her silent struggles from her family. In the clip, Manabat smiles during a video call with her family but it immediately fades away as she faces hardships and dangers while working abroad. At the latter part, it is revealed that a fellow OFW extends support to Manabat without her […]...
Keep on reading: Silent Sanctuary highlights OFWs in 'Una' music video featuring Xyriel Manabat

philippines.title: Rider killed, back rider critical after hitting pole in San Fernando
philippines.description:
LAPU-LAPU CITY, Cebu — A 21-year-old motorcycle rider died while his female back rider was left in critical condition after their motorcycle crashed into an electric pole along the national highway in Barangay North Poblacion, San Fernando town, early Saturday morning, May 30. The fatality was identified as Franz Ruel Cabanada, 21, a resident of Buhisan, Barangay Labangon, Cebu City. His back rider, Riolyn Trisana, 20, also of Buhisan, Barangay Labangon, sustained serious injuries and remains under medical observation at a hospital. READ: Motorcycle riders killed in Asturias and Cebu City According to the investigation conducted by the San Fernando […]...
Keep on reading: Rider killed, back rider critical after hitting pole in San Fernando

philippines.title: PBA: ROS import Jaylen Johnson confident despite facing elimination
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines—Jaylen Johnson doesn’t seem worried after Rain or Shine was sent to the brink of elimination following a Game 5 loss to Barangay Ginebra on Friday. The Elasto Painters suffered a 111-104 loss and now trail 2-3 in their semifinals series. “[My] confidence is still super high. I trust the team and staff,” said the burly reinforcement. “My back has been against the wall all my life. I love this situation. The best things come out of it.” READ: Tempers flare anew in Ginebra-Rain or Shine Game 5 clash Johnson left it all on the floor for the Elasto […]...
Keep on reading: PBA: ROS import Jaylen Johnson confident despite facing elimination

energy.title: How a Regional Gulf Coast Port Became America's Crude Oil Export Capital
energy.description: Three decades ago, I had just graduated from Texas A&M University and taken my first job as a chemical engineer in Corpus Christi, Texas. At the time, few people would have expected that this Gulf Coast city would one day sit at the center of the global energy system. Corpus was an important regional hub—refineries, chemical plants, steady industrial activity—but it wasn't viewed as a strategic asset on the world stage. Today, it is exactly that. The Port of Corpus Christi has become the largest crude oil export hub in the United…

energy.title: Colombia’s Oil Industry Faces a Defining Election in 2026
energy.description: Colombia’s rapidly approaching 2026 presidential election is generating considerable concern about the economy, notably the country’s oil industry. Gustavo Petro, a former guerrilla who won the 2022 election to become Colombia’s first left-wing president, introduced policies aimed at reducing the country’s reliance on fossil fuels. While this spurred the development of renewable energy, it is responsible for sparking an energy crisis in Colombia. There is hope that a new president will revive Colombia’s economically…
